task_registration.action_summary: Task Scheduler uses pwsh to launch the AI_OS night-cycle script with the approved apply flag from the disabled task definition.
task_registration.query_output_summary: Task Scheduler COM query returned Enabled=false, State=Disabled, executable=pwsh, expected arguments matched, working directory matched C:\Dev\Ai.Os, and last result indicated the task has not run.

rollback.rollback_disable_path: Windows Task Scheduler task AIOS_Relay_Nightly -> disable
rollback.rollback_delete_path: Windows Task Scheduler task AIOS_Relay_Nightly -> delete

next_safe_action: Review the disabled registration evidence in a PR. Enabling AIOS_Relay_Nightly requires a separate Anthony-approved APPLY packet.
no_protected_runtime_statement: No task run, task enablement, runtime launch, runtime execution, queue mutation, SOS send, broker action, live trading, credential access, telemetry/runtime write, dashboard write, destructive cleanup, push to main, or merge was performed.
